REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (70 Bradford Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared via zoom for San Francisco Public Administration (petitioner).
Anthony Navarro (realtor for buyer) appeared in person for and with Daniel Baker (buyer).

The sale was confirmed at $1,150,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 15, 2025. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
